---
title: "Critique AI Statistical Output"
subtitle: "Use multiple models or agents as reviewers"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

# Goal

Use AI tools to critique AI-assisted statistical work.

# Task

Take the output from the advanced modeling module or OLS diagnostics module and ask at least two independent tools, models, or sessions to critique it.

# Rules

- Give the reviewer enough context to understand the analysis.
- Ask for statistical critique, not just code style.
- Ask reviewers to identify assumptions, diagnostics, data leakage, overclaiming, and interpretation errors.
- Compare the critiques and decide what to act on.

# Acceptance Criteria

Your report should include:

- What analysis was reviewed.
- Which tools/models reviewed it.
- A table of critique themes.
- Which critiques you accepted.
- Which critiques you rejected and why.
- One revised result or interpretation.

# Work Area

```{r}
# Start here.
```
